_comment: Music source map for in-battle BGM. Per the project decision, the .ogg tracks themselves are NOT vendored into this repo (193 files / ~147MB). At battle start the runtime downloads ONLY the track the stage needs from `remoteBaseUrl` (BCU's official bcu-assets repo, served with Access-Control-Allow-Origin:*), and the browser HTTP-caches it. A track id N resolves to the file `${id padded to `pad` digits}.ogg`. If a same-named file is dropped into public/assets/music/ it overrides the remote download (see localBaseUrl), which is why files live here unzipped rather than in a bundle.
